MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAVID DICKEY'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is off calendar per the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
